additionalActions: 生成初稿后追问是否继续成稿
rules: Every approval card must render the full primaryActions list, even when only one default action is recommended.
Additional actions are optional multi-select controls, but the standard options must remain available unless a local config explicitly hides them.
Digital asset actions are separate from writing actions. Writing a draft never means copying it into the asset library.
If primary action is 待定-看备注 or 丢弃, additional actions are not executed unless the user's note clearly overrides the primary action.
